attributes.action: Allow review of refused immigration and asylum cases after 10 years
attributes.additional_details:
Many people have lived in the UK for over 10 years after their applications were refused, and their circumstances have changed significantly during this time.

They may have built strong connections, contributed to their communities, and established their lives in the UK. In addition, conditions in their home countries may have changed.

We believe that reviewing these long-standing cases
attributes.background: We urge the UK government to review immigration and asylum applications refused over 10 years ago, as circumstances may have changed.”

rejection.details:
We are not clear what action this petition is seeking.

You may wish to sign this open petition which calls for similar action:
'Introduce amnesty for migrants already in the UK without visa'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/760448
